objective: Fix agents/sim-runner.md to document the deployer script as the canonical hldpro-sim install path (replacing stale PyPI and editable-install references), and fix the shared persona fallback path from packages/hldpro-sim/personas/ to sim-personas/shared/ (where the deployer actually puts them). Update docs/agents-adoption-guide.md to document the deployer-based install flow for the sim-runner prerequisite block.
scope_boundary: agents/sim-runner.md — Step 1 (install check) and Step 3 (persona fallback path) surgical edits
docs/agents-adoption-guide.md — sim-runner prerequisite block: add deployer-based install subsection
out_of_scope: scripts/deployer/deploy-hldpro-sim.sh — deployer script is correct as-is; no changes needed
sim-runner Step 4 (Python invocation pattern) — PersonaLoader shared_dir wiring is a follow-on concern
Any changes to STANDARDS.md, OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md, or other governance surface files not listed in scope_boundary
research_summary: Reviewed agents/sim-runner.md (Step 1 references pip install hldpro-sim==0.1.0 from PyPI as a fallback, and Step 3 uses packages/hldpro-sim/personas/ as the shared persona path). Reviewed scripts/deployer/deploy-hldpro-sim.sh — it installs via pip-editable or directory-copy fallback and deploys managed personas to sim-personas/shared/. Reviewed docs/hldpro-sim-consumer-pull-state.json confirming consumer_target is sim-personas/shared/ and consumer_record_path is .hldpro/hldpro-sim.json. The deployer is the canonical mechanism; the agent must reference it rather than a non-existent PyPI package.
research_artifacts: agents/sim-runner.md — Step 1 (stale pip install hldpro-sim==0.1.0) and Step 3 (stale shared path)
scripts/deployer/deploy-hldpro-sim.sh — canonical install mechanism; deploys to sim-personas/shared/
Issue #561: sim-runner references stale PyPI path + wrong shared persona directory

sprints.name: Sprint 1 — Fix agents/sim-runner.md (Step 1 + Step 3)
sprints.goal: Replace stale PyPI fallback in Step 1 with deployer-first install check, and fix Step 3 shared persona path to sim-personas/shared/.
tasks: Edit Step 1: replace pip install hldpro-sim==0.1.0 block with deployer check (.hldpro/hldpro-sim.json exists) + deployer run instruction
Edit Step 3: replace packages/hldpro-sim/personas/<persona_id>.json fallback path with sim-personas/shared/<persona_id>.json
acceptance_criteria: No reference to pip install hldpro-sim==0.1.0 or PyPI in agents/sim-runner.md
Step 1 instructs agent to check .hldpro/hldpro-sim.json and run deployer if absent
Step 3 shared fallback path is sim-personas/shared/<persona_id>.json
File remains valid Markdown with correct YAML frontmatter

sprints.name: Sprint 2 — Update docs/agents-adoption-guide.md sim-runner block
sprints.goal: Add deployer-based install subsection to the sim-runner prerequisite block so operators know canonical install flow.
tasks: Add Installation subsection: deployer command, .hldpro/hldpro-sim.json consumer record, sim-personas/shared/ persona target, pinned_sha verification against docs/hldpro-sim-consumer-pull-state.json
acceptance_criteria: sim-runner section in adoption guide references bash <governance-root>/scripts/deployer/deploy-hldpro-sim.sh <consumer-repo-path>
.hldpro/hldpro-sim.json consumer record is documented as commit-required
sim-personas/shared/ is documented as commit-required persona target
pinned_sha verification step against docs/hldpro-sim-consumer-pull-state.json is present

specialist_reviews.focus: Confirm edits are surgical: only Step 1 install block and Step 3 persona path in sim-runner.md, plus sim-runner prerequisite block in adoption guide. No other governance surface files touched.
specialist_reviews.summary: Scope tightly bounded to two files. Both edits traceable to docs/hldpro-sim-consumer-pull-state.json contract and deploy-hldpro-sim.sh implementation. No standards changes, no OVERLORD_BACKLOG changes.

specialist_reviews.focus: Verify the deployer path, persona target dir, and consumer record path match what deploy-hldpro-sim.sh actually writes.
specialist_reviews.summary: deploy-hldpro-sim.sh writes personas to $CONSUMER/sim-personas/shared/ and consumer record to $CONSUMER/.hldpro/hldpro-sim.json. Both paths now match the corrected agent documentation.

alternate_model_review.summary: Tier 1 documentation fix. Two surgical edits to agent markdown files. Not a standards change, not a governance surface schema change. SoM charter does not require alternate-model review for documentation corrections.
evidence: STANDARDS.md §Society of Minds — alternate review required for architecture/standards changes only
Issue #561 — documentation path fix, no schema changes

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Two surgical edits to agents/sim-runner.md (Step 1 deploy-first install check, Step 3 shared persona path fix) and addition of deployer install subsection to docs/agents-adoption-guide.md sim-runner block. All governance paperwork written. No push, no PR — dispatcher handles.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Dispatcher: review diff, push branch issue-561-sim-runner-deployer-path-20260422, open PR against issue-559-five-new-agents-20260422.

material_deviation_rules: If any edit touches files outside scope_boundary, HALT and report to dispatcher.
If Step 4 PersonaLoader shared_dir wiring is found to also be wrong, open a new issue — do not absorb into this slice.
If deploy-hldpro-sim.sh changes its persona target path in a future PR, agents/sim-runner.md and adoption guide must be updated in the same PR.
If hldpro-sim is ever published to PyPI under a different version, the deployer remains the canonical path — PyPI is not an alternative install method for governance agents.
